parameters.query:
SELECT 
  -- Session metadata
  s.session_id,
  s.session_number,
  s.customer_company,
  s.status,
  s.currency,
  s.created_at,
  s.updated_at,
  s.is_training,
  s.notes,
  s.mediation_type,
  s.template_source,
  
  -- Template & Clause Builder tracking
  s.template_name,
  s.template_pack_id,
  s.clauses_selected,
  s.clause_count,
  
  -- Customer requirements
  cr.deal_value,
  COALESCE(cr.service_required, s.contract_type) as contract_type,
  cr.industry,
  cr.contact_name as customer_contact,
  cr.contact_email as customer_contact_email,
  cr.company_name as customer_name,
  
  -- Provider data (filtered by provider_id if provided, falls back to session for training)
  COALESCE(pb.provider_company, s.provider_company, 'Provider') AS provider_company,
  COALESCE(
    pb.provider_contact_name,
    CASE 
      WHEN s.is_training = true AND s.notes LIKE '%Opponent:%' 
      THEN TRIM(SPLIT_PART(SPLIT_PART(s.notes, 'Opponent:', 2), '|', 1))
      ELSE NULL 
    END
  ) AS provider_contact,
  pb.provider_contact_email,
  pb.provider_id,
  pb.bid_id,
  pb.status as bid_status,
  
  -- Leverage data (baseline)
  lc.customer_leverage as baseline_customer,
  lc.provider_leverage as baseline_provider,
  lc.alignment_percentage,
  lc.is_aligned,
  lc.calculation_factors,
  lc.leverage_factors_breakdown,
  lc.calculated_at,
  
  -- Leverage tracker (dynamic)
  COALESCE(s.leverage_tracker_customer, lc.customer_leverage, 50) as tracker_customer,
  COALESCE(s.leverage_tracker_provider, lc.provider_leverage, 50) as tracker_provider,
  s.leverage_tracker_calculated_at as tracker_calculated_at,
  
  -- Legacy fields for backwards compatibility
  s.customer_leverage,
  s.provider_leverage,
  
  -- Role Matrix fields
  s.contract_type_key,
  s.initiator_party_role
FROM sessions s
LEFT JOIN customer_requirements cr ON cr.session_id = s.session_id
LEFT JOIN provider_bids pb ON pb.session_id = s.session_id 
  AND (
    NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Session ID').first().json.providerId }}', '') IS NULL
    OR pb.provider_id = NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Session ID').first().json.providerId }}', '')::uuid
  )
LEFT JOIN leverage_calculations lc ON lc.session_id::uuid = s.session_id
WHERE s.session_id = '{{ $('Extract Session ID').first().json.sessionId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY lc.calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  COALESCE(s.leverage_tracker_customer, lc.customer_leverage, s.customer_leverage, 50) as customer_leverage,
  COALESCE(s.leverage_tracker_provider, lc.provider_leverage, s.provider_leverage, 50) as provider_leverage,
  lc.alignment_percentage,
  lc.is_aligned,
  lc.calculation_factors,
  lc.leverage_factors_breakdown,
  lc.calculated_at,
  s.leverage_tracker_customer as tracker_customer,
  s.leverage_tracker_provider as tracker_provider,
  s.leverage_tracker_calculated_at as tracker_calculated_at,
  s.customer_leverage as baseline_customer,
  s.provider_leverage as baseline_provider
FROM sessions s
LEFT JOIN leverage_calculations lc ON lc.session_id::uuid = s.session_id
WHERE s.session_id = '{{ $('Extract Session ID').first().json.sessionId }}'::uuid
ORDER BY lc.calculated_at DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    scp.position_id,
    scp.clause_id,
    scp.clause_number,
    COALESCE(mc.clause_name, cc.clause_name, ucc.clause_name, scp.clause_content) as clause_name,
    COALESCE(mc.category, cc.category, ucc.category) as category,
    COALESCE(mc.description, cc.description, ucc.content) as description,
    scp.parent_position_id,
    scp.clause_level,
    scp.display_order,
    scp.customer_position,
    scp.provider_position,
    scp.original_customer_position,
    scp.original_provider_position,
    scp.current_compromise,
    scp.ai_suggested_compromise,
    scp.gap_size,
    scp.gap_severity,
    scp.customer_weight,
    scp.provider_weight,
    scp.is_deal_breaker_customer,
    scp.is_deal_breaker_provider,
    scp.clause_content,
    scp.customer_notes,
    scp.provider_notes,
    scp.priority_level,
    scp.status,
    scp.position_set_at,
    scp.position_set_by,
    scp.source_type,
    scp.source_master_clause_id,
    scp.source_template_clause_id,
    scp.added_mid_session,
    scp.added_by_party,
    scp.custom_ai_context,
    scp.is_applicable,
    scp.marked_na_by,
    scp.marked_na_at,
    scp.na_reason,
    mc.position_options,
    mc.ai_context,
    mc.negotiation_guidance,
    COALESCE(mc.is_category_header, false) as is_category_header,
    scp.customer_confirmed_at,
    scp.customer_confirmed_position,
    scp.provider_confirmed_at,
    scp.provider_confirmed_position,
    scp.agreement_reached_at,
    scp.final_agreed_position,
    COALESCE(scp.is_locked, false) as is_locked,
    scp.locked_at,
    scp.locked_by_user_id
FROM session_clause_positions scp
LEFT JOIN contract_clauses cc ON cc.clause_id = scp.clause_id
LEFT JOIN master_clauses mc ON mc.clause_id = scp.clause_id
LEFT JOIN uploaded_contract_clauses ucc ON ucc.clause_id = scp.clause_id
WHERE scp.session_id = '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.sessionId }}'::uuid
AND (
    scp.bid_id IS NULL 
    OR scp.bid_id = (
        SELECT bid_id FROM provider_bids pb
        WHERE pb.session_id = '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.sessionId }}'::uuid 
        AND (
            '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.providerId }}' = ''
            OR pb.provider_id = NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.providerId }}', '')::uuid
        )
        ORDER BY pb.invited_at ASC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
ORDER BY scp.display_order ASC

SELECT 
    pch.clause_id, 
    COUNT(*) as unseen_count 
FROM position_change_history pch
LEFT JOIN provider_bids pb ON pb.bid_id = pch.bid_id
WHERE pch.session_id = '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.sessionId }}'::uuid
AND (
    '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.providerId }}' = ''
    OR pb.provider_id = NULLIF('{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.providerId }}', '')::uuid
)
AND (
    (pch.party = 'provider' AND pch.seen_by_customer = false AND '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.userRole }}' = 'customer')
    OR 
    (pch.party = 'customer' AND pch.seen_by_provider = false AND '{{ $('Extract Session ID').item.json.userRole }}' = 'provider')
)
GROUP BY pch.clause_id
